name: replicate-mcp-server
description: Universal MCP server giving any MCP client (Claude Desktop, claude.ai, Cursor, Cline, custom apps) native access to Replicate's full catalog: image, video, audio, music, speech, LLM, vision, upscale, inpaint, segment, transcription, embeddings, voice cloning, 3D, lipsync, trainings (fine-tune) and deployments — anything Replicate hosts. Every generate/run tool waits for completion and auto-downloads outputs. Stdio + HTTP/SSE transport, multi-token pool, rate-limit aware, cost estimator.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test test/unit/*.test.mjs && node test/stdio-test.mjs
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run test

author: Ivan Sena (sena-labs)
